headline: The Hormuz Reopening Trade Nobody Is Talking About: 20 Gold And Silver Mining Stocks To Watch
summary: Gold and silver miners have been the worst-performing trade of the Iran war. A ceasefire could be their inflection point.

headline: Assessing International Paper (IP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: What International Paper stock performance says today International Paper (IP) has drawn attention after recent trading, with the stock at $33.52 and showing negative returns over the past month and past 3 months, as well as a negative 1 year total return. See our latest analysis for International Paper. The recent 1-day share price return of 5.21% sits against a weaker backdrop, with a 90-day share price return of a 24.45% decline and a 1-year total shareholder return of a 20.63% decline,...
